name: stockyard-mockllm
description: Mock LLM server with canned responses for CI/CD pipelines. Define fixtures, simulate errors, control latency. Never hit real APIs in tests.

tools.name: mockllm_fixtures
tools.description: List all configured mock fixtures with match patterns.

tools.name: mockllm_add_fixture
tools.description: Add a new mock fixture. Matched prompts return the canned response.

tools.name: mockllm_remove_fixture
tools.description: Remove a mock fixture by ID.

tools.name: mockllm_stats
tools.description: Get mock server stats: total requests, fixture match rate, error simulations.

tools.name: mockllm_set_mode
tools.description: Switch mock mode: fixture (canned), passthrough (forward to real), record (capture + replay).

tools.name: mockllm_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the MockLLM proxy is running and healthy.
